trace: RIP-1.0.0 §5.1 (viability + separation rules) and §5.2 (calibration procedure). Committed BEFORE any pilot run — this file's presence in history before the pilot ledger is the pre-registration act. Values are recorded here and enter the manifest with the calibration evidence.
theta_b_rule: midpoint of the medians of the control-edit and targeted-edit drift distributions
k_rule: the k in k_grid maximizing agreement with the human calibration fold; ties break to the larger k
folds: calibration and verification folds are disjoint; verification agreement is reported only after k and theta_b are frozen
saliency_floor_rule: flat-saliency floor = the 10th percentile of per-candidate max sweep drops on the calibration fold; candidates below it re-adjudicate to E5 at labeling time
fold_rule: identity-sorted position parity within the pilot sample: even positions -> calibration fold, odd -> verification fold; folds are disjoint by construction
